content.rendered:
SAMAN Portable supplies portable cabins in Whitefield direct from our own fabrication unit in Gopasandra, Bengaluru 560099. Whitefield sits in East Bengaluru, and supplying it from our city unit keeps delivery quick and lets our team handle measurement and installation in person.

This page covers what we manufacture for Whitefield buyers, realistic sizes and specifications, how delivery and installation work, and how to get a factory-direct price.

Why Whitefield buyers choose a factory-direct cabin

Whitefield is one of Bangalore's busiest tech and commercial corridors, around the ITPL and EPIP belt, with constant demand for fast, relocatable workspace and site units. A portable cabin gives you a ready office, security post, or site room without conventional construction time.

Buying direct from the manufacturer means you get the maker's price, real customisation, and one team for delivery and installation — instead of a reseller margin and a generic listing.

SAMAN POS India Private Limited has served India since 2009 and was incorporated in 2019. We are ISO 9001:2015 certified with Udyam, Startup India, ZED, and NSIC registrations, and our cabins are built on IS 2062 steel frames.

Portable cabins we supply in Whitefield

  • Site and office cabins — for project sites, IT campuses, and commercial plots.
  • Security cabins and guard posts — compact units for gates and entry points.
  • Cabins with toilet or pantry — self-contained units for longer site stays.
  • Multi-cabin and double-storey units — more built-up area on a small footprint.

Explore the full portable cabin range for configurations and options.

Typical sizes and specifications (customisable)

Common sizes include 10×8 ft, 12×8 ft, 16×8 ft, 20×8 ft, and 40×8 ft, with internal height around 8–9 ft. Specifications can be customised:

  • Frame: IS 2062 mild-steel structural frame and base.
  • Walls and roof: insulated sandwich panels (around 50 mm, with EPS, rock wool, or PUF cores) for heat and sound control.
  • Openings and interiors: doors, windows, electrical points, lighting, and flooring fitted to your layout, with optional AC provision.
  • Finish: coated steel and panels suited to Bangalore's monsoon and humidity.

If a size or feature is not listed, it can usually be customised to your need. For the base product, see our MS portable cabins.

Delivery and installation in Whitefield

Cabins are fabricated at our Bengaluru 560099 unit and delivered ready to Whitefield and nearby areas such as Kadugodi, Hoodi, Brookefield, and the ITPL belt. Our team places the unit on your site and connects it. Because our factory is within the city, transport time and cost stay low and installation can be scheduled quickly. Exact lead time depends on size and customisation and is confirmed at order.

Warranty and support

Cabins are covered by 5 years structural frame and base + 1–2 years finishing + 20–25 years engineered service life. The 5-year cover is on the structural frame and base, 1–2 years on finishing, and 20–25 years is the engineered service life of the structure — not a warranty period. Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery or installation as per policy. We have completed 500+ projects across India.

Get a price for your Whitefield site

Share the cabin size, intended use, insulation and interior needs, and your exact Whitefield location, and we will confirm specification and a factory-direct price. Site visits and customisation are available.

Contact the Bangalore team

  • Call or WhatsApp: +91 62009 09435
  • Hours: Mon–Sat, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Sunday closed)

FAQs


Do you deliver portable cabins inside Whitefield quickly?

Yes. Cabins are fabricated at our Bengaluru 560099 unit and delivered to Whitefield and nearby areas. As our factory is within the city, transport and installation can be scheduled quickly; exact timing is confirmed at order.


Can the cabin be customised for an IT campus or site office?

Yes. Size, layout, doors and windows, electrical points, flooring, and optional AC provision can all be customised, and we can add a toilet or pantry for longer stays.


What is the price of a portable cabin in Whitefield?

Price depends on size, insulation, and interior fit-out. Because we are the manufacturer, we provide a factory-direct quote once we know your size and specification.


Are the cabins strong enough for long-term outdoor use?

Yes. Cabins are built on an IS 2062 mild-steel frame with coated steel and insulated panels suited to Bangalore's weather, and are covered by a 5-year structural frame and base warranty.


Can I see or inspect a cabin before buying?

Yes. You can arrange a site visit or discussion with our Bangalore team, who can explain options and confirm what suits your Whitefield location.

excerpt.rendered: Discover the versatility of Portable Cabins in Whitefield – ideal for your space solutions. Affordable, custom designs to suit your unique needs.

author.name: Aman Dubey
author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.
